title: In the case of using the role, there is a problem with the acl check of the view
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE VIEW active_users AS SELECT id, username FROM users WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';
key_bug_features: User lacks privileges to access created view
